image:image.image:title: JCTM Digital Sanctuary — Jesus Christ Temple Ministry Official Homepage
image:image.image:caption: The official digital home of Jesus Christ Temple Ministry (JCTM), Warri, Nigeria — Temple TV sermons, giving, events, and the Correction Mandate.

image:image.image:title: Prophet Amos Evomobor — Founder and Senior Pastor of Jesus Christ Temple Ministry
image:image.image:caption: Prophet Amos Evomobor, founder of JCTM (Jesus Christ Temple Ministry), Warri, Delta State, Nigeria — carrier of the divine Correction Mandate.

image:image.image:title: About Jesus Christ Temple Ministry (JCTM) — History, Vision, and Mission
Prophet Amos Evomobor — Leader of Jesus Christ Temple Ministry (JCTM)
image:image.image:caption: Prophet Amos Evomobor leads JCTM with the Correction Mandate, restoring apostolic Christianity across Nigeria and 40+ nations.

image:image.image:title: Temple TV Sermons — JCTM Sermon Library by Prophet Amos Evomobor
image:image.image:caption: Browse 479+ sermons from Temple TV — teachings on holiness, the Correction Mandate, apostolic Christianity, end times, and more.

image:image.image:title: Warri City Crusade 2026 — Jesus Christ Temple Ministry
image:image.image:caption: Prophet Amos Global Crusade — April 30 to May 1, 2026, Ighogbadu Primary School, Okumagba Avenue, Warri, Nigeria.
